statement: In every magma, Equation 697 (`x = y * (x * ((z * z) * w))`) implies Equation 1898 (`x = (y * (x * y)) * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0757
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z z) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x y)) (op y y))
